title: Campaigns - Stephen Morgan MP

text_excerpt: Campaigns - Stephen Morgan MP Skip to main content x-twitter bluesky facebook instagram email Hit enter to search or ESC to close Search Close Search search Menu About Portsmouth Parliament Education Economy Health Environment Crime Defence Campaigns Events Transparency Get in touch search Campaigns Here are the active campaigns that Stephen is currently working on. Please show your support by signing these pledges. Ban Conversion Therapy Cutting NHS waiting times Deliver better buses End sewage pollution Give us our bobbies back Local dentist services Sign up to my newsletter Sign Up Now Here to help Stephen is bringing politics back to the high street with his constituency office. Any constituent can pop by to his office and see him or his team with their ideas, issues or concerns. The office is open for enquiries Monday to Thursday 10am to 11.30am and 2pm to 3.45pm. A regular advice centre, appointments and home visits are also available.
